title: [packit] Propose downstream failed for release v4.8.0-rc1
body:
Packit failed on creating pull-requests in dist-git (https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/podman.git):

| dist-git branch | error |
| --------------- | ----- |
| `f37` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/4975 |
| `f38` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/4972 |
| `f39` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/4973 |
| `rawhide` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/4974 |


You can retrigger the update by adding a comment (`/packit propose-downstream`) into this issue.

comments.body: @lsm5 Could you PTAL, is this issue still needed.
This occurred because the podman RC got tagged before the required packit change got deployed. We should be good for future RCs.
